name: Gentle Cleansing Foam
description: A soft and gentle foam that deeply cleanses pores without stripping moisture.
descriptionZh: 绵密云朵泡沫，深入清洁毛孔污垢，洗后肌肤水润不紧绷。

name: Ultra Hydrating Serum
description: Packed with hyaluronic acid for 24-hour deep hydration.
descriptionZh: 富含多重分子玻尿酸，24小时深层锁水保湿，令肌肤散发极光般透亮。
